title: AQUATIC, RECREATION, AND SENIOR CENTER - 211info
text: LINCOLN CITY COMMUNITY CENTER AQUATIC, RECREATION, AND SENIOR CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Community Center with indoor swimming pools, locker rooms and showers, weight room, cardio room, indoor rock climbing wall, indoor walking and running track, basketball gym, meeting rooms, and senior center. Also provides land and water physical activities, classes, and special events. 2150 NE Oar Place Lincoln City, OR 97367 Eligibility: Unrestricted. Must meet income eligibility requirements for youth scholarships. Hours: Monday-Friday 6am-7:30pm, Saturday 9am-5pm, Sunday 9am-1pm Email (541) 994-2131 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 994-2131 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in FEES: Memberships, punch passes, and drop-in rates are available. Accepts Silver & Fit, Renew Active, One Pass, and Aaptiv Advantage Medicare Fitness plans. Discounts available for Lincoln City residents. Scholarships available. DOCUMENTS: Proof of residency required for local resident discount. Varies by scholarships. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Lincoln County TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: One block off Highway 101 near NW 22nd Street, behind the Oceanlake Elks Lodge. On-site bus shelter for Lincoln County Transit. Services: General Recreational Activities/Sports Neighborhood Multipurpose Centers Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. LINCOLN CITY COMMUNITY CENTER
